title: anthistiria tremula var. thwaitesii
intro: Anthistiria tremula var. thwaitesii, commonly known as the Thwaites' feather grass or Anthistiria, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Anthistiria tremula var. thwaitesii include treating fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as acting as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
